name: matrix-decode
title: MatrixDecode
description: Each character flickers through random glyphs, then settles to its target left-to-right — a decode reveal. The flicker is deterministic (seeded PRNG keyed by char index + frame), so it renders identically every time.
pickWhen: a one-shot reveal where the text decoding is the moment. Short strings only — long lines drown the effect.
